origin.capability_match: Access secrets from GCP Secret Manager (roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor) (Doc 43)

attack_surface.data_description: GCP Service Account Key (Asset 213) is deleted, disabled, revoked, or its usage leads to rate-limiting/lockout.

security_gap.gap_description: Legitimate services relying on Actor 108 lose access to secrets if its key (Asset 213) becomes unavailable or unusable.

actor_risk.description: Actor 108 becomes unable to perform its function of accessing secrets, impacting dependent systems.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Loss of access to critical secrets can disrupt system operations.

assumptions: An attacker gains unauthorized access to manage the GCP Service Account Key (Asset 213) or the account itself.
The attacker deletes, disables, or revokes the key, or misuses it to trigger rate limits or lockouts.
Legitimate systems depend on Actor 108 for accessing secrets from Component 316.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust key management practices, including backup and recovery procedures for service account keys. Monitor key usage and status. Use separate keys for separate critical functions if possible.

description: An attacker causes the GCP Service Account Key (Asset 213) to become unusable (e.g., deletion, revocation), preventing legitimate services that rely on Actor 108 from accessing secrets in GCP Secret Manager (Component 316).

trace_source.matched_capability: Access secrets from GCP Secret Manager (roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor) (Doc 43)
